title: ruscus lugubris
intro: Ruscus lugubris, also known as the mourning ivy, is a type of flowering plant in the Ruscaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever and rheumatism due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ruscus lugubris include reducing swelling and pain, as well as acting as a diuretic, which helps to relieve urinary tract issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also sometimes used in traditional medicine to make ointments and salves for topical application.
